allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH", "User"\); gh auth login --web -h github.com -p https 2>&1)

Bash(node -e "const pe = require\('puppeteer-extra'\); const s = require\('puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth'\); console.log\('pe version:', require\('./node_modules/puppeteer-extra/package.json'\).version\); console.log\('stealth version:', require\('./node_modules/puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth/package.json'\).version\);")

Bash(node -e "try { const pe = require\('puppeteer-extra'\); const s = require\('puppeteer-extra-plugin-stealth'\); pe.use\(s\(\)\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); }")
